---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "CV of Laszlo Szabo — education, qualifications, work experience, leadership roles, and research in transplant surgery and data science."
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(glue)

# Helper: render a CV entry as styled HTML
cv_entry_html <- function(
  title,
  subtitle = NULL,
  location = NULL,
  date = NULL,
  details = NULL,
  url = NULL
) {
  out <- '<div class="cv-entry">\n'
  out <- paste0(out, '<div class="cv-entry-header">\n')
  if (!is.null(url) && url != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, '<span class="cv-entry-title-group">\n')
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<span class="cv-entry-title">{title}</span>\n'))
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<a href="{url}" class="cv-cert-badge" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Verified &#8599;</a>\n'))
    out <- paste0(out, '</span>\n')
  } else {
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<span class="cv-entry-title">{title}</span>\n'))
  }
  if (!is.null(date) && date != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<span class="cv-entry-date">{date}</span>\n'))
  }
  out <- paste0(out, '</div>\n')
  if (!is.null(subtitle) && subtitle != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<div class="cv-entry-subtitle">{subtitle}</div>\n'))
  }
  if (!is.null(location) && location != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<div class="cv-entry-location"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i> {location}</div>\n'))
  }
  if (!is.null(details) && details != "") {
    out <- paste0(out, glue('<div class="cv-entry-details">{details}</div>\n'))
  }
  out <- paste0(out, '</div>\n\n')
  out
}
```

<a href="images/cv.pdf" class="btn btn-primary btn-cv-download" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download PDF
</a>

## Education

```{r}
#| label: education
#| output: asis
education <- read.csv("data/education.csv")
education <- education[order(as.numeric(education$end), decreasing = TRUE), ]
for (i in seq_len(nrow(education))) {
  row <- education[i, ]
  date_str <- paste(row$start, "\u2013", row$end)
  cat(cv_entry_html(row$title, row$description, row$location, date_str))
}
```

## Qualifications

```{r}
#| label: qualifications
#| output: asis
qualifications <- read.csv("data/qualifications.csv")
qualifications <- qualifications[order(as.numeric(qualifications$date), decreasing = TRUE), ]
for (i in seq_len(nrow(qualifications))) {
  row <- qualifications[i, ]
  cat(cv_entry_html(row$title, row$description, row$location, row$date, row$detail))
}
```

## Certificates

```{r}
#| label: certificates
#| output: asis
certs <- read.csv("data/certificates.csv")
certs <- certs[order(as.numeric(certs$date), decreasing = TRUE), ]
for (i in seq_len(nrow(certs))) {
  row <- certs[i, ]
  cat(cv_entry_html(row$title, row$issuer, date = row$date, url = row$url))
}
```

## Work Experience

```{r}
#| label: work
#| output: asis
work <- read.csv("data/work.csv")
work$sort_year <- ifelse(work$end == "present", 9999, as.numeric(work$end))
work <- work[order(work$sort_year, decreasing = TRUE), ]
for (i in seq_len(nrow(work))) {
  row <- work[i, ]
  end_label <- ifelse(row$end == "present", "Present", row$end)
  date_str <- paste(row$start, "\u2013", end_label)
  cat(cv_entry_html(row$title, row$description, row$location, date_str))
}
```

## Leadership Roles

```{r}
#| label: roles
#| output: asis
roles <- read.csv("data/roles.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(roles))) {
  row <- roles[i, ]
  cat(cv_entry_html(row$title, row$organisation, date = row$date))
}
```

## Research

**Principal Investigator**

```{r}
#| label: research
#| output: asis
research <- read.csv("data/research.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(research))) {
  row <- research[i, ]
  cat(glue('<div class="research-entry"><span class="research-acronym">{row$acronym}</span> &mdash; <span class="research-title">{row$title}</span></div>\n'))
}
```

## Skills

```{r}
#| label: skills
#| output: asis
skills <- read.csv("data/skills.csv")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(skills))) {
  row <- skills[i, ]
  cat(glue('<div class="skill-row"><span class="skill-category">{row$category}</span><span class="skill-items">{row$description}</span></div>\n'))
}
```
